A close friend sent me this game. A very causal game to have in the background. He told me about the achievements and I spent a total of 4 hours to almost finish the game. mind you this was like 6 AM, when I quit. I have left the game with millions in currency and a drop if any wants the drops.
Amazing game. have never played a game more fun than this. a friend forced me to get this. its perfect

It's a fun little chill game. I enjoyed it.
Roll around as a tumbleweed, collect points, upgrade then save the earth!
I like the music too.
This game made me fulfil my long life destiny of becoming a red tumbleweed and continuously ramming into a plant monster in the middle of a desert, 10/10.
I played with my friend for a few hours I am  not sure hot many. It was fun but i felt like there wasnt enough of a purpose to playing the game. I felt like there wasn't a real "next step".
A genuine and exquisite experience that is too grandiose for mere human comprehension.
100% the game because i wanted too a lot of rolling with friends

Yeh, I had an alright time, it's kinda basic but whatevs.
Felt like a Roblox game. Not too bad, just some chill idle thing where you bump into cacti and fly around like a comet all day long in the scorching desert, and also beating up some tree rock walking dude over and over (poor guy). Probably should have spent my time playing like an actual full game, but hey, I've seen much worse.


Also, 
DID I REALLY JUST PLAY THIS GAME 8 HOURS IN ONE GO?? SHEEEESH WHAT IS WRONG WITH ME

Funny tumbleweed game encrypted with il2cpp running Codestage Anitcheat. Multiplayer should be script-kiddie free at least until someone uploads a script or something.

Very basic idle game. Needs content but definitely a fun base for a would-be great game. Currently it's just good.
Early game is quite slow though :<

Oddly addicting. Seriously played it for hours. 

I don't know what's wrong with me. But I love this game!
lowkey fun and addicting and i hate myself for enjoying it

Ever since I was but a seedling all I wanted was to tumble in the wind. My own roots disowned me and kicked me out when I came out as a diaspore. I think it was destiny. I roamed and drifted through the American southwest with no real cause or care until aliens took me against my will to mars. There I thought I was stuck and doomed to watch aliens stomp over my old town. I did the only thing I knew how to do.. I tumbled and tumbled some more. Before I knew it, I had amassed enough tumbling strength to defeat the toughest of aliens. I saved the earth and now I tumble around town keeping an ever watchful eye out for more aliens.
good
tubleweed
OST of the century.
It's a small game but weirdly addictive and fun.  It was only three bucks and I definitely got three bucks worth of enjoyment out of it!
best $3 of my life

My friend thought he'd be funny and buy this and make me play it, joke's on him, I became the tumbleweed master, even now in my mind I am a collection of dried brush and sticks, blowing through the desert without a care in the world, occasionally bumping into a cactus, or scratching someone's legs up as a roll into them, my life is complete, I have ascended into a higher state of being, I am no longer controlled by my primal needs for food, water, or reproduction, I am nothing but a tumbleweed rolling through the cosmos
good game

Do you like to tumble? If so, this might just be what you're looking for. Prepare for hour after hour of tumbling fun with this rip roaring adventure based on the real life struggles of actual tumbleweeds!!
the best tumbleweed game on the market
damn
This game is pretty good despite what it looks like. It is worth the money and its quite entertaining.

yea
GAME OF THE YEAR 10/10 best money I ever spent. Better than Minecraft and terraria combined.
this is gas

I'll be up front and honest here. Had the game been any bit more expensive than it is. This would have been a negative review. Treat this as a grey/neutral review if you like.

There's barely a game here. The only thing that's really fun here is getting to full power and being able to fly or combo with the tumbleweed, and it time gates you for as long as it can from getting to that one juicy bit of fun.[spoiler]The secret bonus map is also a huge let down, its huge for no real reason. There's no real secrets in it, and the boss is 10x the health of the normal map, making it take ages to drop if you're the only one not afk, and it largely only drops the same cards as the normal ones just a little stronger, with the exception of two new abilities which really serve no purpose since there's no content past this. I guess you could use them to flex on new players? I don't really see the point personally.[/spoiler]

I wont complain too much more here. Game can still be beat in a day even with the time wasting. It's an OK distraction to break up a routine and thankfully not very expensive.

I bought this game as a joke for myself and friends to josh around for what i thought would be 30mins tops.....Now i am 10hrs deep and absolutely can't help loving the game. A must play with friends just for a mess around type game definitely worth the price of a coffee.

Downloaded this game today and loaded it up with some friends. Played for 11 hours straight. Felt overcome with mystery and adventure. Found myself slowly evolving into a god of tumbleweeds rolling around a world which was now my domain. None of this is a joke.
Was pleasantly surprised at how much i enjoyed this, pretty grindy but worth it. check it out and fufill your Tumbleweed Destiny
perhaps the real tumbleweeds was the friends we made along the way
save me from becoming full weed
amazing, would unlock all achievments again.
Big contender for game of the year

this game really makes you feel like a tumbleweed. this is truly the greatest game I have ever played

Good for a tumble or two, keeps it's shine longer than expected. However, it doesn't really go anywhere interesting once it gets off the ground.

Once I unlocked the DBZ powers it actually got a bit dull and grindy. The idle game mechanics are a bit light and this doesn't really work as one (the point earning rate is just too small).

I'd still recommend it for the novelty
I love this game, its really fun when you have nothing else to do. Sound track is pretty sweet too
